Description:
Description: Azure Cosmos DB Conf 2026 is a free, global, developer first conference focused on building high scale, distributed, and AI powered applications with Azure Cosmos DB.

• 📅 Date: April 28, 2026 • ⏰ Time: 9:00 AM – 2:00 PM Pacific • 📺 Format: Live on YouTube (5 hour live show)

Join Microsoft engineers and community experts for practical, demo driven sessions covering real world architecture, performance tuning, and production lessons using Azure Cosmos DB, Azure DocumentDB, and open source DocumentDB. This conference is built for hands on developers who want real code, real systems, and real lessons from production workloads.

✅ Register for Azure Cosmos DB Conf 2026 https://aka.ms/cosmosconfreg 🌐 Azure Cosmos DB Conf 2026 – Official Website https://aka.ms/azurecosmosdbconf ▶️ Complete Azure Cosmos DB Conf 2026 Playlist Includes all talks plus exclusive on demand only sessions https://aka.ms/CosmosConf2026PL 🔗 Learn more about Azure Cosmos DB https://azure.microsoft.com/products/cosmos-db 📘 Learn more about Azure DocumentDB https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/cosmos-db/documentdb-introduction 🧩 Explore open source DocumentDB https://github.com/microsoft/documentdb 💬 Get involved during the live show Ask questions and share insights in the YouTube chat 🤝 Stay connected after the event

Join the #nosql channel on the Microsoft Open Source Discord https://discord.gg/VYG2ztdA

Subscribe, set a reminder, and join us live for Azure Cosmos DB Conf 2026.

#AzureCosmosDBConf #AzureCosmosDB #AzureDocumentDB
Author: Microsoft Developer
Title: Azure Cosmos DB Conf 2026 | Live Stream
